summary: Plan-mode classification only. The hinted representative #77344 is already closed, so it must not receive any closure action and should not remain the live open canonical. actions.reason: Already closed in hydrated live state; closure actions are invalid for closed refs. It remains historical canonical evidence for the published-port bug but is not a live open canonical.
